findings.title: npm vulnerability: @hono/node-server
findings.description: @hono/node-server: Middleware bypass via repeated slashes in serveStatic. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: axios
findings.description: Axios has a NO_PROXY Hostname Normalization Bypass Leads to SSRF. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: defu
findings.description: defu: Prototype pollution via `__proto__` key in defaults argument. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: hono
findings.description: Hono missing validation of cookie name on write path in setCookie(). Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: lodash
findings.description: lodash vulnerable to Code Injection via `_.template` imports key names. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: next
findings.description: Next.js self-hosted applications vulnerable to DoS via Image Optimizer remotePatterns configuration. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: next-pwa
findings.description: workbox-webpack-plugin. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: rollup-plugin-terser
findings.description: serialize-javascript. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: serialize-javascript
findings.description: Serialize JavaScript is Vulnerable to RCE via RegExp.flags and Date.prototype.toISOString(). Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: workbox-build
findings.description: rollup-plugin-terser. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: workbox-webpack-plugin
findings.description: workbox-build. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.
